generated_oml:
instance DS18S20Sensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer with 64-bit serial code, measuring temperatures from -55°C to +125°C with ±0.5°C accuracy from -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance DS18S20Sensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer with 64-bit serial code, measuring temperatures from -55°C to +125°C with ±0.5°C accuracy from -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance DS18S20Sensor3 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer with 64-bit serial code, measuring temperatures from -55°C to +125°C with ±0.5°C accuracy from -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DS18S20Sensor1, DS18S20Sensor2, DS18S20Sensor3
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature measurements from DS18S20 sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RaspberryPi4Controller, PythonScipyOptimizationLibrary
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed (214×214×3 mm) controlled via Raspberry Pi GPIO using MOSFETs and optocouplers on PCB to handle 4A current for actuation"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan (0.02 m³/s airflow) controlled via Raspberry Pi GPIO using MOSFETs and optocouplers on PCB to handle 4A current for actuation"
]

instance StyrofoamContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container with 0.03 m³ air volume"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply for thermal incubator system"
]

instance RaspberryPi4 : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller"
]

instance PCBWithMOSFETsAndOptocouplers : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for controlling heatbed and fan"
]

instance RabbitMQMessageBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for handling data transmission between physical sensors and virtual models"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, CalibrationService, MonitoringService
]

instance RaspberryPi4Controller : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller handling sensor data acquisition and actuator control"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, CalibrationService, MonitoringService
]

instance PCBWithMOSFETsAndOptocouplersEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for handling 4A current control signals"
    DTDFVocab:enables RaspberryPi4Controller
]

instance PythonScipyOptimizationLibrary : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy optimization library used for non-linear least squares parameter estimation"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]

instance OneWireCommunicationProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "1-Wire communication protocol for connecting DS18S20 sensors to Raspberry Pi"
    DTDFVocab:enables RaspberryPi4Controller
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal model with 2 parameters assuming uniform temperature and no heatbed heat accumulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RaspberryPi4Controller
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal model with 4 parameters accounting for heatbed thermal inertia"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RaspberryPi4Controller
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation models for temperature prediction using Model A and Model B"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms using non-linear least squares for parameter estimation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterEstimationInsight
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Monitoring for safety and optimal operation via fault detection and state estimation"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyMonitoringInsight, OptimalOperationInsight
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictions of temperature distribution for safety monitoring and optimization"
]

instance ParameterEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibrated model parameters based on sensor data"
]

instance SafetyMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time safety monitoring through fault detection and state estimation"
]

instance OptimalOperationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimization decisions for thermal incubator operation based on model predictions"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system with styrofoam insulated container (0.03 m³ air volume), heatbed (214×214×3 mm), fan (0.02 m³/s airflow), three DS18S20 temperature sensors, Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller, PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers, and power supply"
    base:contains StyrofoamContainer, Heatbed, Fan, DS18S20Sensor1, DS18S20Sensor2, DS18S20Sensor3, RaspberryPi4, PCBWithMOSFETsAndOptocouplers, PowerSupply
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Controller sends actuation commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan control) via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which translates them into hardware signals using MOSFETs and optocouplers."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated via RabbitMQ server facilitating communication between physical components (PT) and software components (controller, low-level driver, simulation models) as depicted in Figure 7 of the document."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers the 'as operated' phase, as it is integrated after system deployment for ongoing monitoring and prediction of the physical system's behavior."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validated through experiments testing assumptions (e.g., sensor placement for uniformity), calibration minimizing residual error via Scipy, with Model B showing improved prediction of thermal inertia compared to Model A."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker used for data exchange between PT and DT components, with all communication handled via message queues."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All software components (RabbitMQ, controller, driver) deployed on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safe protocol incorporated into the low-level driver to maintain device safety; optocouplers used for electrical isolation between control signals and high-current actuators."
]
